title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create an account by clicking on Sign Up.

title: Change Email
content: To change your email address, go to Settings > Profile and update your email.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can delete their account from Settings > Security > Delete Account.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Enable two-factor authentication in Settings > Security for extra protection.

title: Subscription Plans
content: View and manage your subscription plans under Settings > Billing.

title: Contact Support
content: Contact support via Help > Contact Us or email support@example.com.

title: Update Profile Picture
content: Update your profile picture from Settings > Profile > Edit Picture.

title: Export Data
content: Export your data from Settings > Privacy > Export Data.

title: App Notifications
content: Manage notification preferences in Settings > Notifications.
